title: Cooling Stages: Temperature Hierarchy in Cryostats
description: Understand the multi-stage temperature architecture of dilution refrigerator cryostats, from room temperature to millikelvin, and how each stage serves specific functions in quantum computing systems.
learningObjectives: Identify and describe the function of each temperature stage in a dilution refrigerator
Calculate heat loads and thermal budgets at each stage
Understand the role of thermal anchoring and heat sinking
Design appropriate thermalization strategies for wiring and components
Analyze the trade-offs between cooling power and available space at each stage
